findings.description: Merge-main commit 'Merge branch main into feat/pod-container-tests' present; rebase onto origin/main and force-push.
getAllContainers fully exercised across no-spec, main-only, combined, init-only, and undefined-spec cases.
getDefaultContainer covers null/undefined, running-main preference, main-over-init priority, init fallback, and empty-containers.
Minimal makePod fixture populates only fields the helpers under test read.
